title: Forget QQQ. This Semiconductor Fund Nearly Quintupled Its 2026 Gain
excerpt: QQQ has had a strong 2026, but investors chasing the AI chip cycle may be leaving a staggering amount of return on the table by sticking with a fund that onl...
content_html:
David Beren

Wed, July 22, 2026 at 5:00 PM CDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • PSI has surged 92% year-to-date versus QQQ's 18%, and its decade-long outperformance shows the gap is not a 2026 anomaly.

  • PSI deliberately underweights NVIDIA to roughly 4% and concentrates on mid-cap semiconductor equipment makers that QQQ barely touches.

  • PSI's elevated volatility, with single-day drops of nearly 5%, makes adding it as a satellite around a QQQ core smarter than a full swap.

  • Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

Anyone holding the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ) in 2026 has watched a decent year unfold. QQQ tracks the Nasdaq-100 and has returned 18.1% year-to-date, riding the AI capex wave that continues to power its largest holdings. With $680.53 billion in assets and a 0.18% expense ratio, QQQ remains the default vehicle for broad, tech-heavy US growth. The case for holding it is real. The case for supplementing it with a narrower, purer semiconductor sleeve is stronger than most QQQ owners realize, and one of Invesco's sister funds has quietly made this year a very different story.

Why QQQ Owners Are Leaving Return on the Table

The top weights are NVIDIA at 8.01%, Apple at 7.26%, Micron at 4.78%, and Microsoft at 4.49%. That mix delivered a 30.62% one-year return, but the semiconductor thread inside the fund is diluted by mega-cap software, consumer hardware, and communication services. When chip stocks lead, the fund captures only the slice of that move that its weightings allow. In 2026, that slice has been small relative to the sector's actual performance.

The Invesco Semiconductors ETF (NYSEARCA:PSI) is the concentrated version of the trade QQQ makes only partially. PSI is up 92.33% year-to-date through July 13, more than five times QQQ's YTD gain. Over the trailing year, PSI has returned 145.91% versus QQQ's 30.62%. Over the past 10 years, PSI has returned 1,591.7%, compared with QQQ's 550.74%. The gap is not a one-year fluke.

Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

What PSI Actually Owns

The semiconductor ETF holds 33 positions, and the weighting philosophy is the mechanism behind the outperformance. As of April 30, 2026, the largest position was MaxLinear at 7.98%, followed by AMD at 6.26%, Texas Instruments at 4.97%, Broadcom at 4.84%, and Micron at 4.67%. NVIDIA sits at just 3.91%, roughly half its weight in the broader tech fund.

The semiconductor ETF deliberately underweights the mega-cap chip names that dominate the broader tech fund and instead concentrates on mid-cap semiconductor equipment makers, analog specialists, and packaging players. Semiconductor equipment stocks (Lam Research, Applied Materials, and KLA collectively at roughly 12.3% of assets) benefit directly from the wafer fabrication capex cycle that PineBridge and Goldman Sachs both flagged in their 2026 outlooks as a durable multi-year tailwind. Owners of the broader tech fund get only faint exposure to those names, if at all.

sentences.zh: 半导体设备股（Lam Research、Applied Materials 和 KLA 合计约占资产的 12.3%）直接受益于晶圆制造资本支出周期，PineBridge 和高盛在 2026 年展望中均将其标记为持久的多年推动力。

sentences.en: Owners of the broader tech fund get only faint exposure to those names, if at all.
sentences.zh: 更广泛的科技基金的所有者即使有的话，也只能微弱地接触到这些名字。

content_html_zh:
大卫·贝伦

2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三下午 5:00 CDT 阅读时间 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • PSI 今年迄今已飙升 92%，而 QQQ 则上涨了 18%，其长达十年的优异表现表明这种差距在 2026 年并非罕见。
  • PSI 故意将 NVIDIA 的比重降低至 4% 左右，并专注于 QQQ 几乎没有涉足的中型半导体设备制造商。
  • PSI 的波动性较高，单日跌幅接近 5%，因此将其作为围绕 QQQ 核心的卫星添加比完全互换更明智。
  • 不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

2026 年，任何持有 Invesco QQQ Trust（纳斯达克股票代码：QQQ）的人都见证了美好的一年。 QQQ 追踪纳斯达克 100 指数，今年迄今已回报 18.1%，人工智能资本支出浪潮继续为其最大持股提供动力。 QQQ 拥有 6805.3 亿美元的资产和 0.18% 的费用比率，仍然是美国以科技为主的广泛增长的默认工具。 持有它的情况是真实的。 用更窄、更纯净的半导体套筒来补充它的理由比大多数 QQQ 所有者意识到的更充分，景顺的姊妹基金之一已经悄悄地让今年的故事变得截然不同。

为什么QQQ所有者不考虑回报

权重最高的是 NVIDIA（8.01%）、Apple（7.26%）、Micron（4.78%）和 Microsoft（4.49%）。 这种组合带来了 30.62% 的一年回报率，但基金内部的半导体线程被大型软件、消费硬件和通信服务稀释。 当芯片股领先时，该基金仅捕捉其权重允许的部分走势。 到 2026 年，这一份额相对于该行业的实际表现来说很小。

Invesco Semiconductors ETF（NYSEARCA：PSI）是 QQQ 交易的集中版本，仅部分交易。 截至 7 月 13 日，PSI 年初至今已上涨 92.33%，是 QQQ 年初至今涨幅的五倍多。 去年，PSI 的回报率为 145.91%，而 QQQ 的回报率为 30.62%。 过去10年，PSI的回报率为1,591.7%，而QQQ的回报率为550.74%。 这种差距并不是一年的侥幸。

不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

PSI实际拥有什么

半导体ETF持有33个仓位，权重理念是跑赢背后的机制。 截至2026年4月30日，持仓最多的是MaxLinear，占7.98%，其次是AMD，占6.26%，德州仪器，占4.97%，博通，占4.84%，美光，占4.67%。 NVIDIA 的份额仅为 3.91%，大约是其在更广泛的科技基金中权重的一半。

半导体 ETF 故意减持在更广泛的科技基金中占主导地位的大型芯片公司，转而专注于中型半导体设备制造商、模拟专家和封装厂商。 半导体设备股（Lam Research、Applied Materials 和 KLA 合计约占资产的 12.3%）直接受益于晶圆制造资本支出周期，PineBridge 和高盛在 2026 年展望中均将其标记为持久的多年推动力。 更广泛的科技基金的所有者即使有的话，也只能微弱地接触到这些名字。
